name: catch-logger
description: Structured catch logging with species identification, measurements, location, weather conditions, and bait tracking. Builds a personal fishing history over time with season-over-season comparisons and catch statistics.
author: Cocapn

commands.name: catch:log
commands.description: Log a new catch with species, weight, length, location, and conditions
commands.example: catch:log halibut 38lb Homer Spit incoming tide salmon head

commands.name: catch:list
commands.description: List recent catches, optionally filtered by species or date range

commands.name: catch:stats
commands.description: Show catch statistics for a species or time period

commands.name: catch:detail
commands.description: Show full details of a specific catch by ID or date

commands.name: catch:compare
commands.description: Compare catches across seasons or locations

commands.name: catch:export
commands.description: Export catch log as JSON, CSV, or markdown
